stories.title: Verify basic sandbox connectivity
stories.description: Confirm we can create a sandbox instance and make HTTP requests to it. No WebSocket yet - just prove the container starts and responds.
acceptance_criteria: Sandbox instance logs show container started

stories.title: Start ttyd process in sandbox
stories.description: Use sandbox.startProcess() to launch ttyd on port 7681. Verify it starts and port becomes available.

stories.title: Establish WebSocket to ttyd
stories.description: Use sandbox.wsConnect() to establish WebSocket connection to ttyd. Verify 101 upgrade response with webSocket property.

stories.title: Bidirectional message flow
stories.description: Verify messages flow both directions: client→ttyd and ttyd→client. Send terminal size, receive prompt.
stories.verification_command: manual test with websocat or browser

stories.title: Add Effect-based error handling
stories.description: Wrap sandbox operations in Effect for typed errors, retries, and timeouts. Reference ~/.vendor/effect patterns.
acceptance_criteria: Retry with exponential backoff on transient failures
stories.verification_command: bun run dev && manually trigger error scenarios

stories.title: Production deploy and verify
stories.description: Deploy to prod (api.myfilepath.com) and verify same behavior as local dev.
